yb.d:
n a soft silvery metallic element; a rare earth of the lanthanide series; it occurs in gadolinite and monazite and xenotime
n a unit of information equal to 1000 zettabits or 10^24 bits
n a unit of information equal to 1000 zettabytes or 10^24 bytes
n a unit of information equal to 1024 zebibytes or 2^80 bytes

yba.t: abbr. Banff;  Alberta; Young Buddhist Association 佛教青年协会; Youth Basketball Association 青年篮球协会

ybco.t: abbr. yttrium barium copper oxide 钇钡铜氧化物

ybd.t: abbr. Y-branching device Y型分路器
